series_metadata.series_description: These records contain all documents pertaining to funds maintained and administered by banks for the collective investments of personal trust accounts within the trust departments of state-chartered banks

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for one (1) year after date of receipt, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for one (1) year after date of receipt, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
